/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/shader_app.dir/src/app_options.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shader_app.dir/src/frame_profiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shader_app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shader_app.dir/src/performance_profiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shader_app.dir/src/shader.cpp.o -o shader_app  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
